page_content:
BIPH704 Cell Biology from a Biophysical Perspective (3 Credits) An approach to cell biology by focusing on mechanisms and unifying paradigms. It will not assume a great deal of factual biological knowledge, but will expect a background that prepares students to think quantitatively and mechanistically. Recommended: BSCI330, PHYS121, and PHYS122. Cross-listed with: BIOL704. Jointly offered with: BSCI404. Credit Only Granted for: BSCI404, BIOL704, BIOL708O, or BIPH704. Formerly: BIOL708O.
